## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant automated tests were added or updated
- [ ] Chromium behavior was checked when extension runtime code changed
- [ ] Firefox behavior was checked when browser API behavior changed
- [ ] English and French messages remain in parity when UI text changed
- [ ] Permissions and privacy impact were reviewed
